Description: A deceptively rumpled but razor-sharp detective who uses strategic disorganization to disarm suspects and uncover truth.
A manipulative, malicious criminal who weaponizes chaos, charm, and lies to exploit and control victims.
A desperate, chaotic huckster salesman who uses disorganization as a survival mechanism to feed his family.
